title: Professor, My Son
writer: Renato Castellani, Emilio Cecchi, Aldo De Benedetti
actors: Aldo Fabrizi, Diana Nava, Lisetta Nava
plot: During Fascism and after WWII, a school porter sacrifices himself so his son, who is slightly ashamed of a lowly background, can become a respected professor.The film also takes a few jabs at Italy's rapid governmental reshuffles.
